title: June 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 27''' is the 178th day of the year (179th in leap years), with 187 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s|1966]] – [[J.J. Abrams]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 15|''Star Wars'' (1977) 15]] published. The cover date is September.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 70|''Star Wars Weekly'' 70]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 54|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 54]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 31|''Star Wars'' (1998) 31]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars Insider 69|''Star Wars Insider'' 69]] released for subscribers.
*[[2006]] – ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' published.
*2006 – ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' published in paperback.
*[[2012]] – [[Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead 3|''Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead'' 3]] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.48]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars Galactic Stories: 7 Stories from a Galaxy Far, Far Away....]]'' published.
*2016 – "[[Peril on Kashyyyk]]" premieres on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[Ronald Falk]] dies.
*[[2018]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 21|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 21]] published.
*2018 – [[Lando - Double or Nothing 2|''Lando - Double or Nothing'' 2]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 6 – Return of the Handmaidens]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic - The Blade]]'' published.
<noinclude>
